title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Narayana Group Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Narayana Group Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Narayana Group Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Narayana Group Advisory Limited:
Narayana Group Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Group Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
